title: satureja cuneifolia var. olla
intro: Satureja cuneifolia var. olla, also known as the mountain savory, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja cuneifolia var. olla include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and exhibiting anti-cancer properties. This plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and aromatherapy.
